ip_outcome_note: Card name matches species name exactly. Depicted figure — dark-furred simian Pokemon with vine-like appendages, leaping aggressively in jungle setting — matches the canonical visual design of Zarude (National Pokedex no. 893). API confirms nationalPokedexNumbers: [893]. Zarude is a Generation VIII Mythical Pokemon, Dark/Grass type. No ambiguity.

trivia_bullets.text: Zarude (National Pokedex no. 893) is a Generation VIII Mythical Pokemon and the primary subject of 'Pokemon the Movie: Secrets of the Jungle,' released December 25, 2020 in Japan. The film centers on 'Dada Zarude,' a Zarude who raises a human boy named Koko in the Forest of Okoya after finding him as an infant. Zarude is the first Dark/Grass dual-type in the series — a combination designed to evoke nature's unforgiving qualities. [Wikipedia: Pokemon the Movie: Secrets of the Jungle]
sources: Wikipedia: Pokemon the Movie: Secrets of the Jungle

trivia_bullets.text: As a Mythical Pokemon, Zarude was distributed as a limited-time event gift: players who preordered tickets for 'Secrets of the Jungle' in their region received a Zarude (Dada form wearing a pink cloth) plus a Shiny Celebi in Pokemon Sword and Shield. The standard Zarude form (depicted on this card) is the wild-roaming variant; the Dada form is distinguished by the pink cloth it wears as a memento of the film's plot. [CBR: Pokemon: Secrets of the Jungle — Who Is Zarude, via WebSearch]
sources: CBR: Pokemon: Secrets of the Jungle — Who Is Zarude, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Zarude V (BRS no. 016/172) is a Grass-type Basic Pokemon V with 220 HP. Its signature attack Jungle Rage deals 120 damage base and an additional 120 (240 total) if the opponent's Active Pokemon is also a Pokemon V. This anti-V tech effect makes the card relevant in V-heavy metagames. Brilliant Stars was the first SWSH set to introduce the VSTAR mechanic; Zarude V predates that tier and has no corresponding VSTAR print. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh9-16]
